description: AI-463/AI-464 (S87) copilot suggestion-payload contract. buildSuggestionResponse MUST stamp every payload with a `source` provenance marker ('ai' | 'fallback' | 'none', AI-464) and the active `promptVersion` (AI-463) so the eval harness and UI can trace which prompt version produced which output. `expectedPromptVersion` pins the version: a prompt change must bump COPILOT_PROMPT_VERSION and this fixture together, else CI fails.
